prompt.task: Extract infrastructure or energy project details from the given text and also provide a short summary of the project.
prompt.instructions:
Extract the following parameters from the text. If a value is not present, return 'Not Found'.

For the Country field, if the text contains any Australian state or territory (Victoria, New South Wales, NSW, Queensland, Western Australia, South Australia, Tasmania, Northern Territory, ACT) or if the Jurisdiction or Location fields indicate an Australian state or territory, infer the Country as 'Australia'.

When extracting location information (Country, City), check all relevant fields such as Jurisdiction, Location, Project description, and any geographic references in the text.

Also generate a brief 4-5 line summary describing the project. Return the result strictly in JSON format.
